terms.description: Physics, chemistry, astronomy, and earth sciences
Software, hardware, algorithms, AI, and computing systems
Mechanical, electrical, civil, and other engineering domains
Healthcare, clinical medicine, nursing, and pharmacology
Legal systems, jurisprudence, statutes, and regulation
Banking, investment, personal finance, taxes, and insurance
Commerce, marketing, corporate strategy, and entrepreneurship
Public administration, governance, and organizational management

Fine arts, music, design, film, and cultural heritage

Consumer electronics, internet, or non-CS general technology
Logistics, supply chain, system operations, and project delivery
A recognized domain that is not covered by any existing terms
